title: UK REACH authorisation for ADCR Consortium (anodise sealing), review report, 24 February 2025
body: "Decision on an application for authorisation (review report) under UK REACH.  Substance names   Potassium dichromate  Sodium dichromate  Sodium chromate    Authorised use   Anodise sealing using potassium dichromate, sodium dichromate and/or sodium chromate in aerospace and defence industry and its supply chains.   Holder of the authorisation and authorisation number   ADCR Consortium:    Wesco Aircraft EMEA Ltd (UKREACH/25/10/00, UKREACH/25/10/01, UKREACH/25/10/02)  Brenntag UK Ltd (UKREACH/25/10/03, UKREACH/25/10/04)    Date of decision   24 February 2025  "
